title: FileHeader::name not validated for path traversal at deserialization
description: messages.rs FileHeader.name is documented as 'basename only — no path components' but no enforcement exists at deserialization or struct construction. A malicious sender can set name: '../../../etc/passwd'. Receiver code that uses this field as a filename without further sanitization will write outside the intended directory. Validation (reject anything containing '/' or '\') must be enforced in the deserialization layer or in a constructor, not left entirely to callers.
close_reason: Fixed this session: deserialize_file_name added to messages.rs
